title: OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES - 211info
text: LIVING UNDONE OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides grief support in a group setting. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st and 3rd Thursdays of the month 6pm-7:30pm Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 223-9955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Suggested donation DOCUMENTS: Waiver AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Bereaved Parent Support Groups Bereavement and Grief Counseling General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Pet Loss Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF TRAVELERS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TEEN GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
